title: North American Clean Fuels Market: Month-in-Review January 2025
content:
Key Highlights:

California LCFS:
  • CA LCFS average Type 1 monthly credit price rose by 1.49% MoM in January.
  • Monthly credit transactions declined by 50.16% MoM in January.
British Columbia LCFS:
  • BC LCFS monthly trading witnessed a rise of 1.72x times MoM.
  • In December,Â BC LCFS saw a rise in credit prices by 34.38% MoM.
Oregon CFP:
  • In December,Â OR CFP average credit prices decreased by 12.32% compared to November.
  • OR CFP trading activity in December rose as 448.47k credits were transferred.
Canada CFR:
  • The average offer price in CC3 increased by 6.87% MoM.
  • The average bid prices for CC2 witnessed a 5.10% decline, while the average offer prices in CC2 dropped by 3.91%.
Washington CFS:
  • Average credit prices in WA CFS rose by 7.66% MoM.
  • For December, 277.36K credits were traded with a total transaction value of $7.13M.
Â United States RFS:
  • Â RIN generation increased by 12.80% in December.
  • A total of 7.35B RINs were transacted in December, 20.14% more than November.
author: Mansift Kaur
